name: Andrew Fabens Memorial Park
description: Andrew Fabens Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huron, OH. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Baywinds Athletic Club
description: Baywinds Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Sandusky, OH. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Cedar Point Sports Center
description: Come play pickleball at Cedar Point Sports Center in Sandusky, OH! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Members only — Daily Drop-In Rate: $5.00 /Monthly Pass Rate: $32.00

name: Kelleys Island Community Park
description: Kelleys Island Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Kelleys Island, OH. There are 4 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Osborn Metro Park
description: Come play pickleball at Osborn Metro Park in Huron, OH! There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
